examples: Wearing a dental guard or splint at night is usually the next step for bruxism.

Some people clench or grind their teeth while they sleep, a condition called bruxism.
Regular exercise and meditation help promote relaxation and may offer relief to those with stress-related bruxism.
As a dental specialist, he examines all his patients for bruxism, or teeth grinding.
